options.systemMessage: Follow the provided prompt exactly. Respond in the language specified in the prompt or input context. Be brief, factual, and helpful. Use attached photo/audio tools only when relevant.

parameters.toolDescription: Analyze session photo in Google Gemini
parameters.text: Analyze the session photo and describe what is visible, prototype elements, notes, risks, and the next step.

parameters.toolDescription: Analyze session audio in Google Gemini
parameters.text: Analyze the session audio recording and describe what was discussed, decisions, risks, overloaded roles, and the next step.
